releases.release_description:
- TAPE Australia
- Bug fixes

### Release notes
[No Signal? No Problem. LiteFarm Goes Offline.](https://www.litefarm.org/post/no-signal-no-problem-litefarm-goes-offline)

### Release notes
[Three Final Wins for 2025: Forgiving, Organised, and Connected](https://www.litefarm.org/post/three-final-wins-for-2025-forgiving-organised-and-connected)

### New this release
- Market integration 🌾 Get published in a partner market directory directly from LiteFarm!
- Inventory for tracking your farm products and supplies (now in beta)
- Completed tasks can now be edited
- Various bugfixes

### Contributors
Huge thanks to @gursimran-singh and @navDhammu for their code contributions 🙌
- Irrigation prescriptions improvements

### Release notes
https://www.litefarm.org/post/smart-and-precise-irrigation-now-with-litefarm

#### In this release
- New feature! Addition of💧irrigation prescriptions💧to the [Ensemble Scientific](https://www.esci.io/) farm addon 
- Assorted bugfixes, particularly around creating and completing tasks

### Contributors
Big thanks to @MrRana937 and @Tbrid their bugfix contributions this release!

- New Smart Irrigation Addon allowing integration with [Ensemble Scientific](https://www.esci.io/) sensors
- New location type + task type for soil sampling
- LiteFarm's backend is now compatible with TypeScript! 🎉 HUGE thanks to @navDhammu for this contribution
- Assorted bugfixes and improvements

### Contributors
Big thanks to @navDhammu and @gursimran-singh for their contributions.
Fix security issue in the Documents section.
Small corrections to Data Policy (v7) in non-English languages

- Update Consent (Data Policy) to v.7 (DE, HI, ML, PA)
- Enhance the user experience for submitting feedback

Big thanks to @gursimran-singh for their contributions.
- Fix issue when creating harvest tasks.
- Fix issue when completing harvest tasks.
- Update Consent (Data Policy) to v.7 (EN, ES, PT, FR)

### Release notes
https://www.litefarm.org/post/start-2025-right-manage-crops-and-animals-seamlessly-with-litefarm

### Contributors
Big thanks to @navDhammu, @Joaquin-M2, @gursimran-singh, @Tbrid, @kevin-wu01, @zagran and @dariaedicas for their contributions.

- Release LiteFarm in the Malayalam, Punjabi and Hindi languages 
- bugfixes and improvements relating to locales in LiteFarm
- bugfix for repeat crop plan related to soil amendment task

- Release LiteFarm in the German language #3352
- bugfixes and improvements relating to locales in LiteFarm

- Update SurveyStack iFrame target in preparation for their upcoming major update: #3362
- Bugfix on soil amendment: #3347 
- Minor adjustments to translation files and translation workflow: #3343, #3321

Release notes: https://www.litefarm.org/post/exciting-improvements-enhanced-soil-amendment-task-management-in-litefarm

Updates:

> Revamped soil amendment task flow
> Bugfixes
> Release badge notification
> Error fallback screen
- Patch axios intercepter logic: #3279

- Update data policy to version 6.0 #3217 #3225
- Update policy consent application logic #3222 #3224 #3229

- Fixed several bugs related to Google SSO login #3089 #3091 #3092 
- Fixed bug in navigation menu where Finances section wasn't highlighted when navigating to subsections other than Transactions #3086 
- Fixed bug on profile information update caused by a browser language setting not being supported by LiteFarm #3098
- Transaction editing navigation bugfix #3081 #3085
- Account creation bug hotfix #3066

Release notes: https://www.litefarm.org/post/a-new-look-for-a-new-year

Updates:

> Revamped navigation across devices
> Enhanced admin menu on the side navigation
> Dedicated mobile navigation
> Desktop-specific menu for the map

- Improved API error logging #3023 #3025
- Adjust configuration to help users get the newest version of the app #3027 #3029 #3030

- Small translation fixes
- Local development environment fix for Windows: #3011 
- Bugfix: #3014

Release notes: https://www.litefarm.org/post/An-investment-in-finances

Updates:
> Updated finances overview
> Export transactions list
> Custom revenue types
> Custom expense types
> New default expense types
> Zip download for multi-page documents
> Customize homepage background

Release notes: https://www.litefarm.org/post/power-to-the-plans-and-people

Updates:
> Support for repeating crop plans
> Support for deleting crop plans
> Cumulative harvest amounts on crop plans
> Support for assigning a crop plan
> Inactive users now visually different

Introduction of sensors and accompanying functionality as well as a few bug fixes. Currently support two sensor types: temperature and soil_water_potential.

More information can be found here: https://lite-farm.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/LITEFARM/pages/1185611781/Sensors
Several small bugfixes and usability enhancements

Updates:
- Support for genus and species at the crop level
- Support for cultivars and varietals
- Support for custom crop images
- Nomination architecture for suggesting crops to LiteFarm Community
- Introduction of irrigation tasks, supporting both volume-based and depth-based approaches
- Several task improvements
- Ability to download documents
- Limited offline capabilities on the crop catalogue

Fixes:

- LF-2599: Action needed to react to Google Sign-In being discontinued
- LF-2967: Implement new Google SSO requirements when accepting an invite to a farm

Fixes:
- LF-2521 Fix for crop plan 400 error on setting estimated seeding to mt

Fixes:

- LF-2676	When converting a pseudo user into an existing user who has access to the farm, both users disappear
- LF-2649	Updating a salary to FW without an account causes issues
- LF-2627	FW seeing add locations spotlight on map
- LF-2623	Custom tasks not showing up in task list
- LF-2576	For Buffer zone and watercourse, not giving any length breaks LF
- LF-2555	Add sandbox_user Boolean column to user table
- LF-2554	Unable to switch an existing users role
- LF-2692	Fix certification docs date range

- Fix [LF-2614](https://lite-farm.atlassian.net/browse/LF-2614): API crashes when user ignores invite and "continues with Google"
- Log API crashes and restart service


## What's Changed
* V3.2.2 by @smattingly in https://github.com/LiteFarmOrg/LiteFarm/pull/2137


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/LiteFarmOrg/LiteFarm/compare/v3.2.2...v3.2.3

- revert behavior of unit inputs
- fix recurring spotlights
- fix wording of "task assigned" notifications
Fix dynamic units display

- move to Vite
- Notifications Centre
- improved certifications exports
Fixes some Portuguese translation issues.

- Record A
- fix Finances NaN
